## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for SEO and GEO Lead role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to productize content marketing using AI, creating high-volume, quality content for clients](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [The role involves owning SEO/GEO strategy, improving service quality across accounts, and experimenting with new optimization techniques](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Challenges include maintaining consistent quality at scale, navigating client relationships, and adapting to rapid changes in search/AI landscape](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3395.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Approach

  - [Productizing content marketing as a service, leveraging AI for scale](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Creating "machines" combining AI and human expertise for high-volume content creation](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Example: Webflow integration docs (95% AI-generated) and upcoming developer guides](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Aim to be at the forefront of AI-driven marketing changes for clients](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Role Overview: SEO and GEO Lead

  - [Own significant piece of SEO and GEO strategy across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Improve average quality of service across all customers](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Lead experimentation in GEO optimization, which is still an emerging field](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Work with team to adopt and implement new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)

### Content Creation Process and Challenges

  - [Content creation mostly automated, with human involvement at key stages](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=2910.0)
  - [Challenges in maintaining quality and consistency across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3395.0)
  - [Need for people who can work in a hybrid ops/product role, interfacing with engineering](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3431.0)
  - [Importance of setting high standards for SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)

### Client Management and Engagement Structure

  - [Often take over entire content/SEO function for clients](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Initial weeks spent on strategy and aligning stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
  - [Need to navigate potential tensions with existing teams/stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
  - [Importance of clear lane-carving and periodic strategy reassessment (e.g., quarterly)](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3323.0)

### GEO (AI Search) Optimization

  - [Still experimental, with no established best practices](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Using tools like Profound for prompt tracking and visibility benchmarking](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Challenges in determining valuable prompts and measuring impact](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Potential for higher intent traffic from LLM referrals, but needs validation](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)

### Future of SEO and Content Marketing

  - [Uncertainty about the future of SEO in 6-18 months](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
  - [Exploring alternative strategies (e.g., seeding Reddit discussions)](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3667.0)
  - [Potential shift in how marketing is done and what the agency offers](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
  - [Goal to productize and scale service for smaller businesses (e.g., law firms)](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3757.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss with team regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3858.0)
  - [Spencer to follow up with any additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=3858.0)
  - [Potential exploration of how Spencer's experience could address GrowthX's challenges in maintaining quality and adapting to AI-driven changes in SEO/content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/x2yMvUZxSs39-JCsF9EYQchSPtGfcvAK?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
